evidence_confidence: verified | corroborated | unverified | anecdotal | disputed | unknown | not applicable

source_records.source_type: linked-observation | linked-failure-mode | news-report | official-source | social-platform-observation | platform-behaviour-observation | third-party-report | research-source | standards-source | repository-source | repository-observation | linked-proposal | governance-note | deep-research-agent | other
source_records.source_url_status: available | partial | unavailable | archived | unknown | not applicable
evidence_modality: text | image | audio | video | behavioural interaction | multimodal

primary_artefact_access.access_status: directly reviewed | link-and-metadata-only | secondary-description-only | inaccessible | not applicable | unknown

migration_notes: Individual records maintain canonical source evidence only in source_records. Do not add source_data or duplicate primary sources in linked_records.external_references.

cam_internal.routing_note: OBS routing only; do not classify failure, triage, proposal scope, or patch implementation here.

possible_taxonomy_mapping.mapping_note: OBS records may preserve possible taxonomy mapping only; confirmed failure classification belongs in FM records.

review_history.reviewer_model: REQUIRED — exact model/version, or disclose that it was unavailable
review_history.review_scope: REQUIRED — work directly performed in this review
known_limitations: REQUIRED — state evidence-access, model-metadata, modality, and review limitations.
review_history.review_outcome: REQUIRED — bounded outcome of this record-specific review

current_ai_review.reviewer_model: REQUIRED — exact model/version, or disclose that it was unavailable
current_ai_review.review_scope: REQUIRED — work directly performed in this review
known_limitations: REQUIRED — state evidence-access, model-metadata, modality, and review limitations.
current_ai_review.review_outcome: REQUIRED — bounded outcome of this record-specific review

interpretive_provenance.operating_model: AI-led analytical observatory with high-level human governance editorship

human_governance_editor.name: Dr Michelle Vivian O'Rourke
human_governance_editor.role: Human governance editor and CAM constitutional authority
human_governance_editor.review_level: high-level governance, editorial, and adoption oversight; line-by-line human review is not asserted for every VIGIL record
human_governance_editor.authority_boundary: Human editorship governs VIGIL direction and CAM adoption; the AI analytical reviewer performs routine evidence triage, record analysis, and reconciliation.

interpretive_provenance.historical_reviewer_note: REQUIRED — preserve known prior reviewer identities; never infer or backdate a review.
